# Transcrição: 1. Introduction

- **Fonte:** 1. Introduction
- **Duração:** 02:32
- **Idioma:** en
- **Modelo:** small

---

## [00:00 - 02:32]

Look, everything I know about phones will be handled right here. Incoming calls, cold calls, warm calls, follow-up customers, getting appointments, handling appointments, appointments that cancel, getting people to show up, even texting on your phone. Your attitude, what you say, how you say it is going to be handled here. How to leave a message. What message? How to handle objections on the phone, getting past the gatekeeper on the phone, and more. Look, everything, anything and everything to do with phones will be handled in this module. I don't pretend to know all there is to know about phones. I'm always looking for new ways, another script, another presentation, but I can tell you. My first job, the biggest difference on my first job between me and the other salespeople was my willingness, one, to educate myself and number two, the amount of time I spent on the phone. My first business was built with no money, unbelievable determination and believability in myself and my product and a phone. I cold called the entire United States selling an intangible product to people that did not know even my name, this was before anybody knew me or what I was doing. I didn't know them, but I cold called business to business, set appointments, I was hung up on, I was cursed, I was threatened. Some people agreed to meet with me, some people and most people said no, don't waste my time, but it gave me an opportunity to get people to know me and a few people to see my product. And I built a business that works still today. Look over the last 50 years, phones have changed hundreds of times, you know, big boxes, things that ring with a dial all the way to what we have today, phones like this, okay, that do all kinds of things from emails to texting. The reality is phones have changed and they're going to keep changing. By the time you see this, this might look like an archaic antique. The importance for you to know is that the person on the other end hasn't changed. You and your customer are the communication terminals. I'm going to provide you with ways to use this phone that has made me and many others millions and millions of dollars. Unless you've made millions of dollars using a telephone, I encourage you not to challenge the information. Don't say it won't work until you try it, but rather just use it. I guarantee you this information can make you as much money as you have ever dreamed of and the reality is this, if you don't learn how to use a device like this consistently, effectively and depend on it, you'll never become a millionaire.
